channel.title: MS Graph Registry Updates
channel.description: Real-time notifications for new Microsoft Graph Permissions

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all channel messages in Microsoft Teams

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Reports.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Lifecycle workflows reports without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementRBAC.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the properties relating to the Microsoft Intune Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Email.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read email methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write tenant-wide print settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Tasks.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all users' tasks and task lists in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LearningProvider.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, read, and delete data for the learning provider in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list and read all workflows, tasks and related lifecycle workflows resources without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamMember.ReadWriteNonOwnerRole.All
item.description: Add and remove non-owner members from teams, on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow changing a member's role to or from owner.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityUserFlow.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read or write your organization's user flows, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ProfilePhoto.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all profile photos of users and groups, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LearningAssignedCourse.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read data for all assignments in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: MailboxConfigItem.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete user's UserConfiguration objects, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureAD
item.description: Allows the app to request and manage just in time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of users to Azure AD built-in administrative roles, on behalf of signed-in users.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EntitlementManagement.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write access packages and related entitlement management resources without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Tasks.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's tasks and task lists, including any shared with the user. Doesn't include permission to create, delete, or update anything.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Sites.FullControl.All
item.description: Allows the application to have full control of all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityCopilotWorkspaces.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Security Copilot resources without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Workflow.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, list, read and delete all workflows and tasks in lifecycle workflows without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Printer.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and update printers on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow creating (registering) or deleting (unregistering) printers.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkTargetedMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all group chat or channel targeted messages in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: MailboxConfigItem.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read user's UserConfiguration objects, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ThreatAssessment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read your organization's threat assessment requests on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to create new requests to assess threats received by your organization on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PlaceDeviceTelemetry.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write telemetry for all workplace devices, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityIncident.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write security incidents, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentCollection.ReadWrite.Global
item.description: Allows the app to read and update global collection and manage its membership in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.ReadWrite.CrossCloud
item.description: Allows the app to read and update external cloud user profiles without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthenticationMethod.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's authentication methods, including phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like the signed-in user's passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the signed-in user's authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Policy.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calls.Initiate.All
item.description: Allows the app to place outbound calls to a single user and transfer calls to users in your organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-TimePeriod.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write time period definitions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomAuthenticationExtension.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's custom authentication extnesions, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Group.Create
item.description: Allows the app to create groups without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-SoftwareOATH.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's SoftwareOATH authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserShiftPreferences.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage all users' shift schedule preferences without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentity.Create.All
item.description: Allows the app to create agent identities, even if the app is not the parent agent identity blueprint.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelSettings.Read.All
item.description: Read all channel names, channel descriptions, and channel settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-SourceSystem.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read source system definitions on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BusinessScenarioData.Read.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to read the data associated with the business scenarios it owns, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityAnalyzedMessage.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, and update security defender analyzed message data of an organization without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExternalItem.Read.All
item.description: Allow the app to read external datasets and content, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RecordsManagement.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allow the application to create, update and delete any data from Records Management, such as configuration, labels, and policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomTags.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Read and write custom tags data on behalf of the signed-in user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkTag.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write tags in Teams without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthenticationMethod.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. Authentication methods include things like a user's phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleEligibilitySchedule.Remove.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to delete the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OrganizationalBranding.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the organizational branding resources, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CloudApp-Discovery.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read details of discovered cloud apps in the organization, on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CallDelegation.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write delegation settings of you

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BackupRestore-Restore.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read restore sessions, on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Mail.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete email in user mailboxes. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: GroupMember.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to list groups, read basic properties, read and update the membership of the groups this app has access to without a signed-in user. Group properties and owners cannot be updated and groups cannot be deleted.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelMessage.UpdatePolicyViolation.All
item.description: Allows the app to update Microsoft Teams channel messages by patching a set of Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy violation properties to handle the output of DLP processing.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Application.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read applications and service principals on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTeam
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in teams the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChannelSettings.Read.All
item.description: Read all channel names, channel descriptions, and channel settings, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprintPrincipal.EnableDisable.All
item.description: Allows enabling or disabling agent identity blueprint principals with a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AuditLogsQuery-CRM.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Dynamics CRM workload, on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxItem.Export
item.description: Allows the app to export the user's mailbox items, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: ServiceMessageViewpoint.Write
item.description: Allows the app to update service announcement messages' admin user status on behalf of the signed-in admin user. The message status can be marked as read, archive, or favorite.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Application.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read applications and service principals on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkDevice.Read.All
item.description: Allow the app to read the management data for Teams devices, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleManagementPolicy.Read.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read policies for privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Invitation.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to list, read, create, and delete Tenant Governance invitations on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.Read.WhereInstalled
item.description: Allows the app to read all one-to-one or group chat messages in Microsoft Teams for chats where the associated Teams application is installed, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-SoftwareOATH.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read SoftwareOATH authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-CustomExt.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, list, read and delete all Lifecycle workflows custom task extensions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomAuthenticationExtension.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's custom authentication extnesions, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all risky service principal information for your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWriteForTeam
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall all tabs to teams the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChannelMember.Read.All
item.description: Read the members of channels, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: NetworkAccess-Reports.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all network access reports without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatSubmissionPolicy.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's threat submission policies without a signed-in user. Also allows the app to create new threat submission polices without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Domain.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all domain properties on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to add, verify and remove domains.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-Microsoft365Install.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelectedForUser
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps installed for the signed in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.Read.Defender
item.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write identity security available user actions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Organization.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the organization and related resources, without a signed-in user. Related resources include things like subscribed skus and tenant branding information.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Team.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Get a list of all teams, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PendingExternalUserProfile.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write available properties of pending external user profiles, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CloudPC.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the properties of Cloud PCs on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OrgSettings-DynamicsVoice.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Dynamics customer voice settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TrustFrameworkKeySet.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read trust framework key set properties on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintConnector.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read print connectors on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChatMember.Read.All
item.description: Read the members of all chats, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.AccessReview
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's directory access review default policy without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ExternalConnection.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all external connections without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-Microsoft365Install.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SearchConfiguration.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read search configurations, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Phone.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read phone authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Workflow.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, list, read and delete all workflows and tasks in lifecycle workflows on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: GroupSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete on the list of tenant-level or group-specific group settings objects that you have access to in the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SharePointTenantSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read the tenant-level settings of SharePoint and OneDrive, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calls.InitiateGroupCall.All
item.description: Allows the app to place outbound calls to multiple users and add participants to meetings in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all identity risky service principal information for your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DelegatedPermissionGrant.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for delegated permissions exposed by any API (including Microsoft Graph), on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calendars.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read events of all calendars, except for properties such as body, attachments, and extensions, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create new business scenarios and fully manage the configurations of scenarios it owns, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-SoftwareOATH.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write SoftwareOATH authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: WorkforceIntegration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage workforce integrations without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceActivity-Exchange.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Exchange service activity, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SignInIdentifier.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's sign-in identifiers, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PlaceDevice.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all workplace devices, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ServiceActivity-Microsoft365Web.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Microsoft 365 Web service activity, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-DynamicsVoice.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Dynamics customer voice settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read basic service and resource information without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AccessReview.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings in the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForChat.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ProgramControl.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on programs and program controls in the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkDevice.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allow the app to read and write the management data for Teams devices, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to request and manage time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrintJob.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read the metadata and document content of print jobs without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MultiTenantOrganization.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write multi-tenant organization details and tenants on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrintTaskDefinition.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and update print task definitions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Bookmark.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read all bookmarks that the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: VirtualEvent.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all virtual events without a signed-in user

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: MailboxSettings.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete user's mailbox settings. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AuditLog.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query your audit log activities, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityRiskyUser.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky user information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky users.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of other users in your organization, and read basic company properties, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: WindowsUpdates.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all Windows update deployment settings for the organization on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-MicrosoftAuthApp.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read Microsoft authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LicenseAssignment.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read license assignments for users and groups, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Sites.Manage.All
item.description: Allows the app to create or delete document libraries and lists in all site collections without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the properties of devices managed by Microsoft Intune, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to list and query any shared user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user. It also permits the application to export external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), for any user associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute definitions for the tenant without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamworkTag.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read tags in Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: VirtualAppointmentNotification.Send
item.description: Allows an application to send notifications for virtual appointments for the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ShortNotes.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read all the short notes a sign-in user has access to.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesAutoConfig.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the sensors window auditing configuration of the signed in user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AiEnterpriseInteraction.Read.User
item.description: Allows the app to read user AI enterprise interactions, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamworkTargetedMessage.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the user to update group chat or channel targeted messages in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.HybridAuthentication
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's hybrid authentication policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read and write all chat messages in Microsoft Teams, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForUser
item.description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on a user account, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OrgSettings-Forms.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Microsoft Forms settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: MailboxSettings.Read
item.description: Allows the app to the read user's mailbox settings. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.Read.OnPremAuthenticationPolicy
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's on-prem authentication policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BusinessScenarioData.Read.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to read all data associated with the business scenarios it owns. Data access will be attributed to the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: VirtualAppointment.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows an application to read and write virtual appointments for the signed-in user. Only an organizer or participant user can read and write their virtual appointments.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIncident.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all security incidents, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OnlineMeetingAiInsight.Read.Chat
item.description: Allows the teams-app to read all aiInsights for online meetings where the Teams-app is installed, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsTelephoneNumber.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's acquired telephone number details, without a signed-in user. Acquired telephone numbers may include attributes related to assigned object, emergency location, network site, etc.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsActivity.Send
item.description: Allows the app to create new notifications in users' teamwork activity feeds on behalf of the signed in user. These notifications may not be discoverable or be held or governed by compliance policies.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExchangeMessageTrace.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to search the email message trace on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Group-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update the on-premises sync behavior of groups on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Files.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all files the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.Export.All
item.description: Allows the app to export data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with any user in your company, when the app is used by a privileged user (e.g. a Company Administrator).

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadSelectedForUser.All

item.description: Allows the app to read, create, update and delete all files in all site collections without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-CustomExt.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Lifecycle workflows custom task extensions on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AiEnterpriseInteraction.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read user AI enterprise interactions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForChat
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself in chats the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: VirtualAppointmentNotification.Send
item.description: Allows the application to send notification regarding virtual appointments as any user, without a signed-in user. The app must also be authorized to access an individual user's data by the online meetings application access policy.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of devices managed by Microsoft Intune, without a signed-in user. Does not allow high impact operations such as remote wipe and password reset on the device's owner

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityAlert.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write to all security alerts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SensitivityLabel.Evaluate.All
item.description: Allows the app to evaluate all sensitivity label.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Channel.Create
item.description: Create channels in any team, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: FileStorageContainer.Selected
item.description: Allows the application to utilize the file storage container platform to manage containers, without a signed-in user. The specific file storage containers and the permissions granted to them will be configured in Microsoft 365 by the developer of each container type.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Files.ReadWrite.Selected
item.description: Allows the app temporary access to read and write specific files that the user selects through open with in the UX. The app has access for several hours after the user selects a file.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AuditLogsQuery.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from all services.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.Read.CloudPC
item.description: Allows the app to read the Cloud PC role-based access control (RBAC) settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security defaults policy without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: SMTP.Send
item.description: Allows the app to be able to send emails from the user's mailbox using the SMTP AUTH client submission protocol.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BookingsAppointment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read and write bookings appointments and customers, and additionally allows read businesses information, services, and staff on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Calendars.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete events in user calendars.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskyUser.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the identity risky user information for your organization without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service announcement messages on behalf of the signed-in admin user. Messages may include information about new or changed features.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Device.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read a user's list of devices on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Printer.Create
item.description: Allows the application to create (register) printers on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Bookings.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read bookings appointments, businesses, customers, services, and staff on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceMessageViewpoint.Write
item.description: Allows the app to update service announcement messages' admin user status on behalf of the signed-in admin user. The message status can be marked as read, archive, or favorite.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.Read.HybridAuthentication
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's hybrid authentication policies without a signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security available users

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AppCertTrustConfiguration.Read.All

item.description: Allows the app to read all network access information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ApprovalSolution.ReadWrite.All

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RealTimeActivityFeed.Read.All

item.description: Allows the application to list and read all Tenant Governance policy templates without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CloudPC.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the properties of Cloud PCs, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-External.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's external authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-HardwareOATH.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write HardwareOATH authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleEligibilitySchedule.Remove.Directory
item.description: Delete all eligible privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: NetworkAccess.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all network access information and configuration settings without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Community.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list Viva Engage communities, and to read their properties on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AuthenticationContext.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the authentication context information in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Printer.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and update printers without a signed-in user. Does not allow creating (registering) or deleting (unregistering) printers.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SharePointCrossTenantMigration.Manage.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, write and manage your tenant's SharePoint Cross-Tenant migration settings and tasks, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Notifications.ReadWrite.CreatedByApp
item.description: Allows the app to deliver its notifications on behalf of signed-in users. Also allows the app to read, update, and delete the user's notification items for this app.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.ManageIdentities.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update and delete identities that are associated with a user's account that the signed-in user has access to. This controls the identities users can sign-in with.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments and schedules for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes managing eligible directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and eligible memberships.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Password.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read password authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write Windows Hello authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.description: Allows the app to read the members of all chats where the associated Teams application is installed, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleManagement.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for all RBAC providers, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading role definitions and role assignments.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SensitivityLabel.Evaluate

item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete events of all calendars without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Email.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's email authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Notes.Create

item.description: Allows an app to read all browser site lists configured for your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduRoster.ReadBasic
item.description: Allows the app to read a limited subset of the properties from the structure of schools and classes in an organization's roster and a limited subset of properties about users to be read on behalf of the user. Includes name, status, education role, email address and photo.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Read and write tabs in any team in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user. This does not give access to the content inside the tabs.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes managing eligible directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and eligible memberships.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatIntelligence.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read threat intellgence information, such as indicators, observations, and and articles, without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the application to list and query user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user. It also permits the application to export and remove external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows an app to read the browser site lists configured for your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the application to read tenant-wide people settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allow the app to read or write/update the policy assignment and unassigment for Teams users for all policy type categories.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PublicKeyInfrastructure.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write certificate-based authentication configuration such as all public key infrastructures (PKI) and certificate authorities (CA) configured for the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, create, and delete agent identity blueprints without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PeopleSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write tenant-wide people settings without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Member.Read.Hidden

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ShortNotes.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, edit, and delete all the short notes without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ListItems.SelectedOperations.Selected
item.description: Allow the application to access a subset of listitems without a signed in user. The specific listitems and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.FullControl.All
item.description: Allows the application to have full control of all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.Read
item.description: Allows the application to list and query user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user. It also permits the application to export external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-MicrosoftAuthApp.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write Microsoft Authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ThreatSubmission.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's threat submissions and threat submission policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentCardManifest.ReadWrite.ManagedBy
item.description: Allows the app to read and write agent card manifests that name it as manager in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OnlineMeetingRecording.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all recordings of all online meetings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CloudPC.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of Cloud PCs on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduAssignments.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all class assignments information for all users without a signed-in user without reading any feedback or outcomes.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Community.ReadWrite.All

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ProtectionScopes.Compute.All
item.description: Allows the app to identify Purview data protection, compliance and governance policy scopes defined for all users across tenant.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Exchange
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your organization's Exchange Online service, without a signed-in user. This includes reading, creating, updating, and deleting Exchange management role definitions, role groups, role group membership, role assignments, management scopes, and role assignment policies.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TermStore.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the term store data that the signed-in user has access to. This includes all sets, groups and terms in the term store.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomTags.Read.All
item.description: Read custom tags data on behalf of the signed-in user

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OrgSettings-Todo.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft To Do settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentity.CreateAsManager
item.description: Allows the app to create agent identities and manage agent identities as the parent agent identity blueprint without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: NetworkAccess-Reports.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all network access reports on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsUserConfiguration.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's user configurations on behalf of the signed-in admin user. User configuration may include attributes related to user, such as telephone number, assigned policies, etc.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read a basic set of profile properties of other users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes display name, first and last name, email address, photo, id and security identifier. Also allows the app to read the full profile of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ConsentRequest
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's consent requests policy without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for application permissions to any API (including Microsoft Graph) and application assignments for any app, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsTelephoneNumber.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and modify your tenant's acquired telephone number details on behalf of the signed-in admin user. Acquired telephone numbers may include attributes related to assigned object, emergency location, network site, etc.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: ShortNotes.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read all the short notes a sign-in user has access to.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Place.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your company's places (conference rooms and room lists) for calendar events and other applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.Read.ConditionalAccess
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's conditional access policies, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SensitivityLabel.Evaluate
item.description: Allows the app to evaluate all sensitivity label.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read data for all self-initiated courses in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DelegatedAdminRelationship.Read.All

item.description: Allows the app to manage (create-update-terminate) Delegated Admin relationships with customers as well as role assignments to security groups for active Delegated Admin relationships on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security health issues without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Notes.Read.All

item.description: Allows an app to read your organization's threat assessment requests, without a signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the application to read tenant-wide people settings without a signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to create tabs in any team in Microsoft Teams, without a signed-in user. This does not grant the ability to read, modify or delete tabs after they are created, or give access to the content inside the tabs.

item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your organization's Exchange Online service, on behalf of the signed-in user. item.title: [Application] New Permission: Presence.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read presence information of all users in the directory without a signed-in user. Presence information includes activity, availability, status note, calendar out-of-office message, timezone and work location.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.RevokeSessions.All
item.description: Allow the app to revoke all sign in sessions for a user, on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-InboundFlow.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read inbound data flows on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-CustomExt.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, list, read and delete all Lifecycle workflows custom task extensions on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForChat
item.description: Allows the app to read the Teams apps that are installed in chats the signed-in user can access. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentCardManifest.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read agent card manifests in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SignInIdentifier.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's sign-in identifiers, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Contacts.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read user contacts.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamMember.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Add and remove members from teams, on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows changing a member's role, for example from owner to non-owner.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AppCatalog.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the apps in the app catalogs.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleEligibilitySchedule.Read.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments and schedules for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes reading directory role templates, and directory roles.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write passkey authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentForTeam
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in teams the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ExchangeMessageTrace.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to search the email message trace, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Calendars.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars .

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Channel.Create
item.description: Create channels in any team, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.Read.ApplicationConfiguration
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's application configuration policies on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes policies such as activityBasedTimeoutPolicy, claimsMappingPolicy, homeRealmDiscoveryPolicy, claimsPolicy, tokenIssuancePolicy and tokenLifetimePolicy.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ConsentRequest.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read app consent requests and approvals, and deny or approve those requests without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, list, read and delete all workflows, tasks and related lifecycle workflows resources on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsTelephoneNumber.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's acquired telephone number details, without a signed-in user. Acquired telephone numbers may include attributes related to assigned object, emergency location, network site, etc.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Group-Conversation.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write group conversations that the signed-in user has access to.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Read.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to read time-based assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.Read.Exchange
item.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) configuration for your organization's Exchange Online service, without a signed-in user. This includes reading Exchange management role definitions, role groups, role group membership, role assignments, management scopes, and role assignment policies.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForChat
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in chats the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Financials.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write financials data on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: MailboxSettings.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete user's mailbox settings without a signed-in user. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleManagement.Read.Defender
item.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading M365 Defender role definitions and role assignments.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calendars.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read events of all calendars without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Files.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, update and delete the signed-in user's files.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.UpdateBranding.All
item.description: Allows updating agent identity blueprint branding on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Password.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write password authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User-PasswordProfile.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to update password profile property and reset password for all users for all users, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BitlockerKey.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read BitLocker keys for all devices, without a signed-in user. Allows read of the recovery key.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-Forms.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft Forms settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChatMember.Read
item.description: Read the members of chats, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ApprovalSolution.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read approvals event information for all users in your organization without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.DeleteRestore.All
item.description: Allows deleting or restoring agent identity blueprints with a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Notifications.ReadWrite.CreatedByApp
item.description: Allows the app to deliver its notifications on behalf of signed-in users. Also allows the app to read, update, and delete the user's notification items for this app.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-MicrosoftAuthApp.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write Microsoft Authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ConsentRequest.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read app consent requests and approvals, and deny or approve those requests on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PublicKeyInfrastructure.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read certificate-based authentication configuration such as all public key infrastructures (PKI) and certificate authorities (CA) configured for the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AdministrativeUnit.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete administrative units and manage administrative unit membership without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduAssignments.ReadWriteBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete all class assignments information for all users without a signed-in user without accessing or impacting any feedback or outcomes.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's QR authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ExternalUserProfile.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write available properties of external user profiles, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EngagementMeetingConversation.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read all Teams Q&A conversations and their properties on behalf of the signed-in user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Group-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to update the on-premises sync behavior of all groups without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to update the on-premises sync behavior of all users without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Files.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's files.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RecordsManagement.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read any data from Records Management, such as configuration, labels, and policies without the signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleAssignmentSchedule.Read.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read the active role-based access control (RBAC) assignments and schedules for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes reading directory role templates, and directory roles.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesAccount.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security available identity accounts without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.UpdateAuthProperties.All
item.description: Allows updating agent identity blueprint authorization and authentication properties on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.TrustFramework
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's trust framework policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Organization.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the organization and related resources, on behalf of the signed-in user. Related resources include things like subscribed skus and tenant branding information.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-DynamicsVoice.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Dynamics customer voice settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxFolder.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the user's mailbox folders, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AuditLogsQuery-SharePoint.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from SharePoint service.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EventListener.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's authentication listeners, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's passkey authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesSensors.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write identity security sensors on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Tasks.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete the signed-in user's tasks and task lists, including any shared with the user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Files.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, update and delete the signed-in user's files.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-InboundFlow.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write inbound data flows without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskEvent.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risk detection information for your organization without a signed-in user. Update operations include confirming risk event detections.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SchedulePermissions.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read/write schedule permissions for a specific role in Shifts application without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Password.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write password authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Mail.ReadWrite.Shared
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete mail a user has permission to access, including their own and shared mail. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ApplicationConfiguration
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's application configuration policies on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes policies such as activityBasedTimeoutPolicy, claimsMappingPolicy, homeRealmDiscoveryPolicy, tokenIssuancePolicy and tokenLifetimePolicy.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update the on-premises sync behavior of users on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Read and write tabs in any team in Microsoft Teams, without a signed-in user. This does not give access to the content inside the tabs.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.Create
item.description: Allows creating new agent identity blueprints with a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SignInIdentifier.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's sign-in identifiers, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementServiceConfig.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read Microsoft Intune service properties including device enrollment and third party service connection configuration.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.Read.DeviceConfiguration
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's device configuration policies on behalf of the signed-in user. For example, device registration policy can limit initial provisioning controls using quota restrictions, additional authentication and authorization checks.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.CloudPC
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the Cloud PC role-based access control (RBAC) settings, without a signed-in user. This includes reading and managing Cloud PC role definitions and memberships.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Community.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create Viva Engage communities and read all community properties on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Schedule.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all schedules, schedule groups, shifts and associated entities in the Teams or Shifts application without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesActions.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write identity security available actions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceTemplate.Create
item.description: Allows the app to create device templates, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SpiffeTrustDomain.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's SPIFFE trust domains and child resources without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read custom security attribute definitions for the tenant without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Invitation.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to list and read all Tenant Governance invitations on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.B2BManagementPolicy
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's B2BManagement policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-DataConnector.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read data connectors without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ContentActivity.Read
item.description: Read contents activity audit log from the audit store.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LearningContent.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage learning content in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the configurations of your organization's business scenarios, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: People.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read a scored list of relevant people of the signed-in user or other users in the signed-in user's organization. The list can include local contacts, contacts from social networking, your organization's directory, and people from recent communications (such as email and Skype).

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintJob.Read
item.description: Allows the application to read the metadata and document content of print jobs that the signed-in user created.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BackupRestore-Configuration.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the backup configuration, and list of Microsoft 365 service resources to be backed up, on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ApplicationConfiguration
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's application configuration policies, without a signed-in user. This includes policies such as activityBasedTimeoutPolicy, claimsMappingPolicy, homeRealmDiscoveryPolicy, tokenIssuancePolicy and tokenLifetimePolicy.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrinterShare.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the application to read basic information about printer shares on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow reading access control information.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduReports-Reading.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all tenant users reading assignments, speaker assignments, and Reading Coach passages data without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: GroupMember.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to list groups, read basic properties, read and update the membership of the groups the signed-in user has access to. Group properties and owners cannot be updated and groups cannot be deleted.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForTeam.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the Teams apps that are installed in any team, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.Read.AzureResources
item.description: Allows the app to read time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation of user privileges to audit Azure resources in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.ManageIdentities.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update and delete identities that are associated with a user's account, without a signed in user. This controls the identities users can sign-in with.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamworkAppSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the Teams app settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-PlatformCred.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read platform credentials methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementServiceConfig.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read Microsoft Intune service properties including device enrollment and third party service connection configuration, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: WindowsUpdates.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all Windows update deployment settings for the organization without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BackupRestore-Configuration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update the backup configuration, and list of Microsoft 365 service resources to be backed up, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChatMember.ReadWrite
item.description: Add and remove members from chats, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TermStore.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read or modify data that the signed-in user has access to. This includes all sets, groups and terms in the term store.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: eDiscovery.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read eDiscovery objects such as cases, custodians, review sets and other related objects without the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's threat submissions and threat submission policies on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to create new threat submissions on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ApprovalSolution.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create approvals on behalf of the signed-in user, cancel approvals created by the user and read any of the user's approvals (created by the user or assigned to the user).

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security available user actions of signed user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementApps.ReadWrite.All

item.description: Allows the app to read and write data connectors without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Setting.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read Tenant Governance settings without a signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read custom detection rules without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.ReadWrite.All

item.description: Allows the app to read terms of use acceptance statuses on behalf of the signed-in user.
