item.description: Allows the app to create chats on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelMember.Read.Group
item.description: Read the members of channels of a team, without a signed-in user

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.CrossTenantCapability
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's M365 cross tenant access capabilities on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserWindowsSettings.Read

item.description: Allows the app to read a user's windows settings which are stored in cloud and their values on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityUserFlow.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's user flows, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsActivity.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all users' teamwork activity feed, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Application.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create other applications, and fully manage those applications (read, update, update application secrets and delete), without a signed-in user. It cannot update any apps that it is not an owner of.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Mail.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete mail in all mailboxes without a signed-in user. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Storyline.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to modify Viva Engage storylines, read all storylines properties, update storyline properties, and delete storyline properties without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskyUser.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky user information for your organization without a signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky users.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Presence.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read presence information on behalf of the signed-in user. Presence information includes activity, availability, status note, calendar out-of-office message, timezone and work location.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Domain.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all domain properties without a signed in user. Also allows the app to add, verify and remove domains.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityRiskEvent.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read identity risk event information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OnlineMeetingAiInsight.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all AI Insights for all online meetings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthenticationMethod.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. Authentication methods include things like a user's phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdUser.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create agent users, read and write the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of agent ID users, delete and restore agent users in your organization, and read basic company properties, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RealTimeActivityFeed.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to get direct access to real-time enriched data in a meeting, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Calendars.Read.Shared
item.description: Allows the app to read events in all calendars that the user can access, including delegate and shared calendars.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Presence.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read presence information of all users in the directory on behalf of the signed-in user. Presence information includes activity, availability, status note, calendar out-of-office message, timezone and work location.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Password.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's password authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.description: Allows the app to read available properties of external user profiles, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky service principal for your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read group conversations that the signed-in user has access to.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: eDiscovery.Read.All

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: ServiceHealth.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service health information on behalf of the signed-in admin user. Health information may include service issues or service health overviews.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AdministrativeUnit.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete administrative units and manage administrative unit membership on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Remove.AzureADGroup

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps for any user, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.description: Allows the app read, update, and delete agent identities without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleAssignmentSchedule.Remove.Directory

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduReports-Reading.ReadAnonymous.All

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagementAlert.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage all role-based access control (RBAC) alerts for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes managing alert settings, initiating alert scans, dimissing alerts, remediating alert incidents, and reading alert statuses, alert definitions, alert configurations and incidents that lead to an alert.

item.description: Allows the app to read all agent instances and their related collections in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to manage all learning content in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ConsentRequest.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read consent requests and approvals without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.Read.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to read the configurations of business scenarios it owns, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's HardwareOATH authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.PrivilegedOperations.All

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIncident.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write to all security incidents, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Place.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage organization places (conference rooms and room lists) for calendar events and other applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: WorkforceIntegration.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read workforce integrations, to synchronize data from Microsoft Teams Shifts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CallRecords.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read call records for all calls and online meetings without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OnlineMeetingTranscript.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all transcripts of all online meetings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write QR authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Channel.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Read all channel names and channel descriptions, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AuditLogsQuery-Endpoint.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Endpoint Data Loss Prevention workload, on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelMember.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Add and remove members from all channels, without a signed-in user. Also allows changing a member's role, for example from owner to non-owner.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-DataConnector.Upload
item.description: Allows the app to upload data files to a data connector without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SharePointTenantSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and change the tenant-level settings of SharePoint and OneDrive, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceTemplate.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read device templates, their owners, and devices created from those device templates on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementScripts.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write Microsoft Intune device compliance scripts, device management scripts, device shell scripts, device custom attribute shell scripts and device health scripts on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SynchronizationData-User.Upload
item.description: Allows the app to upload bulk user data to the identity synchronization service, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Sites.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete documents and list items in all site collections without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AccessReview.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForTeam
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself to teams the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BackupRestore-Control.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to update or read the status of M365 backup service (enable/disable), on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceActivity-Microsoft365Web.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Microsoft 365 Web service activity, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OrgSettings-Forms.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft Forms settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatSubmission.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's threat submissions and to view threat submission policies without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-ReferenceDefinition.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read reference definitions on your behalf.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AppCatalog.Submit
item.description: Allows the app to submit application packages to the catalog and cancel submissions that are pending review on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ConfigurationMonitoring.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all Configuration Monitoring entities, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintAlertSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read tenant-wide alert settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduCurricula.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the user's modules and resources on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CallEvents.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read call event information for all users in your organization without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Contacts.Read.Shared
item.description: Allows the app to read contacts a user has permissions to access, including their own and shared contacts.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentInstance.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete agent instances in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: VirtualEvent.Read.Chat
item.description: Read information for this webinars or town halls, including schedules, speakers, and event settings and webinar registrations.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Synchronization.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to configure the Azure AD synchronization service, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CopilotPackages.Read.All
item.description: Allows the user to read the packages information

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleAssignmentSchedule.Remove.Directory
item.description: Delete all active privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentCollection.Read.Global
item.description: Allows the app to read global collection and its membership in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.Read.ApplicationConfiguration
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's application configuration policies, without a signed-in user. This includes policies such as activityBasedTimeoutPolicy, claimsMappingPolicy, homeRealmDiscoveryPolicy, claimsPolicy, tokenIssuancePolicy and tokenLifetimePolicy.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityEvents.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's security events on behalf of the signed-in user. Also allows the app to update editable properties in security events on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomDetection.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write custom detection rules without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: ServiceMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service announcement messages on behalf of the signed-in admin user. Messages may include information about new or changed features.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Application.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete applications and service principals on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow management of consent grants.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.B2BManagementPolicy
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all your organization's B2BManagement policies without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BackupRestore-Configuration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update the backup configuration, and list of Microsoft 365 service resources to be backed up, on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-SourceSystem.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write source system definitions on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-OutboundFlow.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read outbound data flowsets and flows without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Files.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all files in all site collections without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Content.Process.User
item.description: Allows the app to process and evaluate content for data security, governance and compliance outcomes for a user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExternalConnection.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to read and write settings of external connections on behalf of a signed-in user. The signed-in user must be an administrator. The app can only read and write settings of connections that it is authorized to.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PublicKeyInfrastructure.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read certificate-based authentication configuration such as all public key infrastructures (PKI) and certificate authorities (CA) configured for the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceTemplate.Create
item.description: Allows the app to create device templates.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AuditActivity.Read
item.description: Read activity audit log from the audit store.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Sites.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read documents and list items in all site collections without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Schedule-WorkingTime.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to trigger the working time policies without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: GroupSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read a list of tenant-level or group-specific group settings objects, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementRBAC.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the properties relating to the Microsoft Intune Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LearningAssignedCourse.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read data for the learner's assignments in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's QR authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to list and query any shared user profile information associated with the current tenant without a signed-in user. It also permits the application to export and remove external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), for any user associated with the current tenant without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-Run.Start
item.description: Allows the app to view and start IndustryData runs without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrintJob.Manage.All
item.description: Allows the application to perform advanced operations like redirecting a print job to another printer without a signed-in user. Also allows the application to read and update the metadata of print jobs.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: User.DeleteRestore.All
item.description: Allows the app to delete and restore users' accounts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.ManageDeletion.Chat
item.description: Allows the app to delete and recover deleted chat, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: FileStorageContainer.Selected
item.description: Allows the application to utilize the file storage container platform to manage containers on behalf of the signed in user. The specific file storage containers and the permissions granted to them will be configured in Microsoft 365 by the developer of each container type.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsResourceAccount.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's resource accounts without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentInstance.ReadWrite.ManagedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete agent instances that designate the calling app as their manager in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: GroupMember.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list groups, read basic group properties and read membership of all groups the signed-in user has access to.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AuditActivity.Read
item.description: Read activity audit log from the audit store.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OnlineMeetingTranscript.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all transcripts of online meetings, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from SharePoint workload, on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AppCatalog.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read apps in the app catalogs without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChannelMessage.Edit
item.description: Allows an app to edit channel messages in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityRiskyAgent.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the risky agents information in your organization without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintJob.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read the metadata and document content of print jobs on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read a basic set of profile properties of users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This includes display name, first and last name, email address, photo, id and security identifier.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkAppSettings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the Teams app settings without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Lists.SelectedOperations.Selected
item.description: Allow the application to access a subset of lists on behalf of the signed in user. The specific lists and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.

item.description: Allows the app to evaluate all sensitivity label.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Mail.ReadBasic
item.description: Allows the app to read email in the signed-in user's mailbox except body, previewBody, attachments and any extended properties.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Bookings.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read and write bookings appointments, businesses, customers, services, and staff on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow create, delete and publish of booking businesses.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Chat.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows an app to read and write 1 on 1 or group chats threads, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.UpdatePolicyViolation.All
item.description: Allows the app to update Microsoft Teams 1-to-1 or group chat messages by patching a set of Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy violation properties to handle the output of DLP processing.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentity.Create.All
item.description: Allows client to create agent identities, even if client is not the parent agent identity blueprint.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DelegatedPermissionGrant.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for delegated permissions exposed by any API (including Microsoft Graph), without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.Archive.All
item.description: Allow the application to archive/unarchive site collections on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: HealthMonitoringAlert.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all scenario monitoring alerts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChannelMessage.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write channel messages, on behalf of the signed-in user. This doesn't allow the app to edit the policyViolation of a channel message.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ServiceActivity-Exchange.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Exchange service activity, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read documents and list items in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CrossTenantInformation.ReadBasic.All

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityUserFlow.ReadWrite.All

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MutualTlsOauthConfiguration.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all device authentication certificate configurations on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForUser

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute definitions for the tenant on behalf of a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduAssignments.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read assignments and their grades on behalf of the user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeProvisioning.Read.All

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementScripts.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read Microsoft Intune device compliance scripts, device management scripts, device shell scripts, device custom attribute shell scripts and device health scripts on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SharePointCrossTenantMigration.Manage.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, write and manage your tenant's SharePoint Cross-Tenant migration settings and tasks, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the application to list and read related tenants information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes instantiating directory roles and managing directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Calendars.Read.Shared
item.description: Allows the app to read events in all calendars that the user can access, including delegate and shared calendars.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Mail.ReadBasic
item.description: Allows the app to read email in the signed-in user's mailbox except body, previewBody, attachments and any extended properties.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Password.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read password authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RecordsManagement.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read any data from Records Management, such as configuration, labels, and policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: FileIngestionHybridOnboarding.Manage
item.description: Allows the app to manage onboarding for a Hybrid Cloud tenant, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SearchConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write search configuration, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AdministrativeUnit.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read administrative units and administrative unit membership on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LearningProvider.Read

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-ReferenceDefinition.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write reference definitions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentInstance.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read agent instances and their related collections in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for application permissions to any API (including Microsoft Graph) and application assignments for any app, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceHealth.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service health information on behalf of the signed-in admin user. Health information may include service issues or service health overviews.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentCollection.Read.Quarantined
item.description: Allows the app to read quarantined collection and its membership in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: MailboxSettings.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read user's mailbox settings without a signed-in user. Does not include permission to send mail.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.HybridAuthentication
item.description: Allows the app to read and wrtie your organization's hybrid authentication policies without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentity.EnableDisable.All

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelectedForTeam.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any team, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.description: Allows the app to read all scenario health monitoring alerts

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Device.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's devices' configuration information without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Tasks.ReadWrite

item.description: Allows the app to read all domain properties without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Sites.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to edit or delete documents and list items in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Directory.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write data in your organization's directory, such as users, and groups. It does not allow the app to delete users or groups, or reset user passwords but it does allow modification of recovery properties that may lead to account takeover.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EngagementMeetingConversation.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list Teams Q&A conversations, and to read their properties without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: VerifiedId-Profile.ReadWrite.All
item.description: This role can read and write Verified Id profiles in a tenant.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduAssignments.ReadWrite.All

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DelegatedAdminRelationship.ReadWrite.All

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserShiftPreferences.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all users' shift schedule preferences without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.Authorization
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's authorization policy without a signed in user. For example, authorization policies can control some of the permissions that the out-of-the-box user role has by default.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.Read.PermissionGrant
item.description: Allows the app to read policies related to consent and permission grants for applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CallTranscripts.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all transcripts of calls, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.ReadBasic.All

item.description: Allows the app to read online meeting artifacts on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.description: Allows the app to read Temporary Access Pass authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LicenseAssignment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to manage license assignments for users and groups, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeAssignment.ReadWrite.All

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Notes.Read

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ConditionalAccess

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxFolder.Read

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleAssignmentSchedule.ReadWrite.Directory

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduAssignments.ReadBasic
item.description: Allows the app to read assignments information on behalf of the user without reading any feedback or outcomes.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Chat.ReadBasic

item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any team, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.Read.OwnedBy

item.description: Allows the application to read and write external authentication methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-PlatformCred.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read platform credentials methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxConfigItem.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read user's UserConfiguration objects, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CallDelegation.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read delegation settings of you

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Workflow.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list and read all workflows and tasks on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update user profiles and read basic company properties without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps installed for the signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ProgramControl.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on programs and program controls that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ProfilePhoto.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all profile photos of users and groups, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureResources
item.description: Allows the app to request and manage time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation of user privileges to manage Azure resources (like subscriptions, resource groups, storage, compute) on behalf of the signed-in users.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementCloudCA.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read certification authority information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityRiskyServicePrincipal.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky service principal information for all service principals in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky service principals.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-AppsAndServices.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide apps and services settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CallTranscripts.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all transcripts of all calls, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BitlockerKey.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read BitLocker keys on behalf of the signed-in user, for their owned devices. Does not allow read of the recovery key itself.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleManagement.Read.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: GroupMember.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read memberships and basic group properties for all groups without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Member.Read.Hidden
item.description: Allows the app to read the memberships of hidden groups and administrative units on behalf of the signed-in user, for those hidden groups and administrative units that the signed-in user has access to.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Calendars.ReadBasic
item.description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars, except for properties such as body, attachments, and extensions.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduReports-Reflect.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all tenant users reflect check-ins submissions data without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForTeam.All
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall its own tabs in any team, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Schedule.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage schedule, schedule groups, shifts and associated entities in the Teams or Shifts application on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read QR authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Chat.ManageDeletion.All
item.description: Allows the app to delete and recover deleted chats, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write properties of Microsoft Intune-managed device configuration and device compliance policies and their assignment to groups.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduAssignments.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write assignments and their grades on behalf of the user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-Run.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read current and previous IndustryData runs on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.Read.B2BManagementPolicy
item.description: Allows the app to read all your organization's B2BManagement policies without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OnPremDirectorySynchronization.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all on-premises directory synchronization information for the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExternalUserProfile.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read available properties of external user profiles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes instantiating directory roles and managing directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChannelMember.Read.All
item.description: Read the members of all channels, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, update, list, read and delete all workflows, tasks and related lifecycle workflows resources without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ProgramControl.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read programs and program controls in the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityIncident.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read security incidents, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AccessReview.ReadWrite.Membership
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings for group and app memberships that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Group-XTenantIdentitySync.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Cross-Tenant Identity Synchronization properties on Groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-HardwareOATH.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read HardwareOATH authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UnifiedGroupMember.Read.AsGuest
item.description: Allows the app to read basic unified group properties, memberships and owners of the group the signed-in guest is a member of.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: MailboxConfigItem.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read all users' UserConfiguration objects.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IdentityProvider.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's identity (authentication) providers' properties on behalf of the user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Notes.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read OneNote notebooks on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read custom security attribute definitions for the tenant on behalf of a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Files.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, update and delete all files the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Workflow.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to list all workflows without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChannelMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read a channel's messages in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: VirtualAppointment.Read
item.description: Allows an application to read virtual appointments for the signed-in user. Only an organizer or participant user can read their virtual appointments.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of devices managed by Microsoft Intune. Does not allow high impact operations such as remote wipe and password reset on the device's owner.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityCopilotWorkspaces.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to write all Security Copilot resources without a signed-in user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeAssignment.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read custom security attribute assignments for all principals in the tenant without a signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintJob.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the application to read the metadata of print jobs on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow access to print job document content.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CopilotPackages.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read packages information without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsTab.Read.All
item.description: Read the names and settings of tabs inside any team in Microsoft Teams, without a signed-in user. This does not give access to the content inside the tabs.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamMember.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Add and remove members from all teams, without a signed-in user. Also allows changing a team member's role, for example from owner to non-owner.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's passkey authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MailboxItem.ImportExport
item.description: Allows the app to export and import the user's mailbox items, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ServiceMessage.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service announcement messages, without a signed-in user. Messages may include information about new or changed features.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: NetworkAccess.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all network access information and configuration settings without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Sites.Selected
item.description: Allow the application to access a subset of site collections without a signed in user. The specific site collections and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Mail.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read mail in all mailboxes without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ConsentRequest
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's consent requests policy on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentForChat
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in chats the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentSelfForChat.All
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself for any chat, without a signed-in user, and manage its permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentCollection.ReadWrite.ManagedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete collections that designate the calling app as their manager and manage their membership in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SpiffeTrustDomain.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's SPIFFE trust domains and child resources on behalf of the user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Phone.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's phone authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Content.Process.User
item.description: Allows the app to process and evaluate content for data security, governance and compliance outcomes for a user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Chat.ManageDeletion.All
item.description: Allows the app to delete and recover deleted chats, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DirectoryRecommendations.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update all Azure AD recommendations, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.Read
item.description: Allows the application to list and query user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user. It also permits the application to export external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatIndicators.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create threat indicators, and fully manage those threat indicators (read, update and delete), without a signed-in user. It cannot update any threat indicators it does not own.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForTeam
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall its own tabs to teams the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Schedule.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read schedule, schedule groups, shifts and associated entities in the Teams or Shifts application on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatIndicators.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all the indicators for your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TrustFrameworkKeySet.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write trust framework key set properties on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: IMAP.AccessAsUser.All
item.description: Allows the app to have the same access to mailboxes as the signed-in user via IMAP protocol.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OnlineMeetingArtifact.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read online meeting artifacts in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ThreatHunting.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to run hunting queries, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: VerifiedId-Profile.Read.All
item.description: This role can read Verified Id profiles in a tenant.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Device.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all device properties without a signed in user. Does not allow device creation, device deletion or update of device alternative security identifiers.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Acronym.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read all acronyms that the signed-in user can access.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-PolicyTemplate.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to list and read all Tenant Governance policy templates on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ServiceActivity-OneDrive.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all One Drive service activity, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Device.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's devices' configuration information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Tasks.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete all users' tasks and task lists in your organization, without a signed-in user

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.PrivilegedOperations.All
item.description: Allows the app to perform remote high impact actions such as wiping the device or resetting the passcode on devices managed by Microsoft Intune, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EngagementRole.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list all Viva Engage roles and role memberships without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ExternalIdentities
item.description: Allows the application to read and update the organization's external identities policy without a signed-in user. For example, external identities policy controls if users invited to access resources in your organization via B2B collaboration or B2B direct connect are allowed to self-service leave.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-HardwareOATH.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's HardwareOATH authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForUser
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall seleected Teams apps in user accounts, on behalf of the signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific users' data.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-HardwareOATH.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write HardwareOATH authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CloudPC.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of Cloud PCs, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.Manage.All
item.description: Allows the application to create or delete document libraries and lists in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ShortNotes.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, edit, and delete short notes of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ApprovalSolutionResponse.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create approvals on behalf of the signed-in user, cancel approvals created by the user and read any of the user's approvals (created by the user or assigned to the user).

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CallEvents.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read call event information for an organization for the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Request.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to list and read all Tenant Governance requests on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to request and manage time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OnlineMeetingAiInsight.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all AI Insights for online meetings, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceActivity-OneDrive.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all One Drive service activity, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ChatMessage.Send
item.description: Allows an app to send one-to-one and group chat messages in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IndustryData-InboundFlow.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read inbound data flows without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: RoleManagementAlert.ReadWrite.Directory
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) alerts for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes managing alert settings, initiating alert scans, dimissing alerts, remediating alert incidents, and reading alert statuses, alert definitions, alert configurations and incidents that lead to an alert.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.Remove.AzureADGroup
item.description: Delete time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ReportSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read admin report settings, such as whether to display concealed information in reports, on behalf of the signed-in user

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.AuthenticationMethod
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the authentication method policies, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprintPrincipal.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, update, create, and delete agent identity blueprint principals on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdUser.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create agent users, read and update agent ID user profiles and read basic company properties, delete and restore agent users without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calls.JoinGroupCall.All
item.description: Allows the app to join group calls and scheduled meetings in your organization, without a signed-in user. The app will be joined with the privileges of a directory user to meetings in your organization.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Calendars.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete events in user calendars.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Channel.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Read channel names and channel descriptions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Mail.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's mailbox.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentCollection.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete collections and manage their membership in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ListItems.SelectedOperations.Selected
item.description: Allow the application to access a subset of listitems on behalf of the signed in user. The specific listitems and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to read, create, and delete time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForUser
item.description: Allows the app to read the Teams apps that are installed for the signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PendingExternalUserProfile.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write available properties of pending external user profiles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OnPremisesPublishingProfiles.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage hybrid identity service configuration by creating, viewing, updating and deleting on-premises published resources, on-premises agents and agent groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.FeatureRollout
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's feature rollout policies on behalf of the signed-in user. Includes abilities to assign and remove users and groups to rollout of a specific feature.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentCardManifest.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write agent card manifests in your organization's Agent Registry on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all your organization's policies without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkAppSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the Teams app settings without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to edit or delete documents and list items in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.CrossTenantAccess
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's cross tenant access policies without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Community.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list Viva Engage communities, and to read their properties without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduCurricula.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write user's modules and resources on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Synchronization.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to configure the Azure AD synchronization service, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrintJob.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and update the metadata and document content of print jobs without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Files.Read.Selected
item.description: Allows the app to read files that the user selects through open with in the UX. The app has access for several hours after the user selects a file.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SynchronizationData-User.Upload
item.description: Allows the application to upload bulk user data to the identity synchronization service, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-Todo.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft To Do settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security defaults policy without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ProgramControl.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read programs and program controls that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ChatMember.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Add and remove members from all chats, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PartnerBilling.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all of billing data from Microsoft for your company's tenant, without a signed-in user. This includes reading billed and unbilled azure usage and invoice reconciliation data.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SensitivityLabels.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to get sensitivity labels.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamSettings.Read.All
item.description: Read all teams' settings, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CallDelegation.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read delegation settings of you

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Team.Create

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.Read.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to read time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of Azure AD groups in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Directory.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read data in your organization's directory, such as users, groups and apps.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentCollection.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete all collections and manage their membership in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Mail.Send
item.description: Allows the app to send mail as any user without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: InformationProtectionPolicy.Read.All
item.description: Allows an app to read published sensitivity labels and label policy settings for the entire organization or a specific user, without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: eDiscovery.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read eDiscovery objects such as cases, custodians, review sets and other related objects without the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: LifecycleWorkflows-Reports.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Lifecycle workflows reports on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: SecurityActions.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read security actions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AuditLogsQuery-Entra.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Entra service, on behalf of a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrivilegedAccess.Read.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to read time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of Azure AD groups in your organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: MultiTenantOrganization.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read multi-tenant organization basic details and active tenants, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OnPremisesPublishingProfiles.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, view, update and delete on-premises published resources, on-premises agents and agent groups, as part of a hybrid identity configuration, without a signed in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: IdentityUserFlow.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's user flows, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.ConditionalAccess
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's conditional access policies, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all the identity security available user actions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete apps in the app catalogs without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read passkey authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Files.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's files.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ReportSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all admin report settings, such as whether to display concealed information in reports, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ExternalUserProfile.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write available properties of external user profiles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: DirectoryRecommendations.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all Azure AD recommendations, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Setting.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read Tenant Governance settings and update them on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write QR authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PlaceDevice.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all workplace devices, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SearchConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write search configurations, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Channel.Delete.All
item.description: Delete channels in any team, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SynchronizationData-User.Upload.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the application to upload bulk user data to the identity synchronization service for apps that this application creates or owns, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduAssignments.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all class assignments with grades for all users without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User.EnableDisableAccount.All
item.description: Allows the app to enable and disable users' accounts, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ManagedTenants.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all managed tenant information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CustomDetection.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read custom detection rules on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Phone.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write phone methods of all users in your organization, without a signed-in user. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EngagementConversation.Migration.All
item.description: Allows the app to create Viva Engage conversations without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: PublicKeyInfrastructure.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to read and write certificate-based authentication configuration such as all public key infrastructures (PKI) and certificate authorities (CA) configured for the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-PolicyTemplate.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the application to list, read, create, update, and delete Tenant Governance policy templates on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadSelectedForTeam.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the selected Teams apps that are installed in any team, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentSelfForUser.All
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself for any user account, without a signed-in user, and manage its permission grants for accessing those specific users' data.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: POP.AccessAsUser.All
item.description: Allows the app to have the same access to mailboxes as the signed-in user via POP protocol.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentCardManifest.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all agent card manifests in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Remove.AzureADGroup
item.description: Allows the app to delete time-based assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintJob.Create
item.description: Allows the application to create print jobs on behalf of the signed-in user and upload document content to print jobs that the signed-in user created.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's threat submissions and threat submission policies without a signed-in user. Also allows the app to create new threat submissions without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Contacts.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete all contacts in all mailboxes without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Directory.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write data in your organization's directory, such as users, and groups, without a signed-in user. It does not allow user or group deletion.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Synchronization.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read Azure AD synchronization information, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
item.description: Allows the app to create new business scenarios and fully manage the configurations of scenarios it owns, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentInstance.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete all agent instances in your organization's Agent Registry without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Relationship.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to list and read all Tenant Governance relationships on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprintPrincipal.DeleteRestore.All
item.description: Allows deleting or restoring agent identity blueprints with a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AuditLog.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and query your audit log activities, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: OrgSettings-Todo.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read organization-wide Microsoft To Do settings, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduCurricula.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all modules and resources, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: MultiTenantOrganization.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Allows the app to read multi-tenant organization basic details and active tenants on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduRoster.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the structure of schools and classes in the organization's roster and education-specific information about all users to be read.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TenantGovernance-Setting.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read Tenant Governance settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: VirtualEvent.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read virtual events created by the you

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Calls.AccessMedia.All
item.description: Allows the app to get direct access to media streams in a call, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Directory.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read data in your organization's directory, such as users, groups and apps, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: User-Phone.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to update business phones and mobile phone properties for all users, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: MutualTlsOauthConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app the read and write all device authentication certificate configurations without a signed-in user.
